    Preparing search index...
    • services/api/authService
    • AuthService

    Variable AuthServiceConst

    AuthService: {
        confirmTotp(code: string): Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>;
        disableTotp(code: string): Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>;
        getMfaStatus(): Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>;
        login(data: { identifier: string; password: string }): Promise<any>;
        logout(): Promise<boolean>;
        register(
            data: {
                avatarBase64?: string | null;
                email: string;
                firstName: string;
                lastName: string;
                password: string;
                username: string;
            },
        ): Promise<any>;
        requestPasswordReset(identifier: string): Promise<boolean>;
        resendVerification(identifier: string): Promise<boolean>;
        resetPassword(token: string, newPassword: string): Promise<boolean>;
        setupTotp(): Promise<{ qrCodeDataUri: string; secret: string }>;
        verifyEmail(token: string): Promise<boolean>;
        verifyTotpLogin(data: { code: string; mfaToken: string }): Promise<any>;
    } = ...

    Client for the account/authentication endpoints: login (incl. 2FA), logout, registration, password reset, e-mail verification and TOTP management. Session cookies are handled by saveFetch; methods throw an Error (sometimes carrying a machine-readable code) on failure so the UI can react.

    Type Declaration

    • confirmTotp: function
      • confirmTotp(code: string): Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>

        Confirms 2FA setup with a valid code, activating two-factor authentication.

        Parameters

        • code: string

          The 6-digit authenticator code.

        Returns Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>

        An object with the resulting enabled flag.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:209
    • disableTotp: function
      • disableTotp(code: string): Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>

        Disables 2FA (requires a valid current code).

        Parameters

        • code: string

          The 6-digit authenticator code.

        Returns Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>

        An object with the resulting enabled flag.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:227
    • getMfaStatus: function
      • getMfaStatus(): Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>

        Returns whether 2FA is currently enabled for the logged-in user.

        Returns Promise<{ enabled: boolean }>

        An object with the enabled flag.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:184
    • login: function
      • login(data: { identifier: string; password: string }): Promise<any>

        Logs in with username/e-mail and password.

        Parameters

        • data: { identifier: string; password: string }

          Credentials (identifier = username or e-mail, plus password).

        Returns Promise<any>

        The server response; when 2FA is enabled it carries mfaRequired and an MFA token.

        Throws

        Error with an optional code (e.g. email_not_confirmed) on failure.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:22
    • logout: function
      • logout(): Promise<boolean>

        Logs the user out on the server (clears the session cookies).

        Returns Promise<boolean>

        true on success.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:165
    • register: function
      • register(
            data: {
                avatarBase64?: string | null;
                email: string;
                firstName: string;
                lastName: string;
                password: string;
                username: string;
            },
        ): Promise<any>

        Registers a new account. No automatic login — the e-mail must be verified first.

        Parameters

        • data: {
              avatarBase64?: string | null;
              email: string;
              firstName: string;
              lastName: string;
              password: string;
              username: string;
          }

          Registration fields (name, e-mail, username, password, optional avatar).

        Returns Promise<any>

        The server response (carries verificationRequired).

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:246
    • requestPasswordReset: function
      • requestPasswordReset(identifier: string): Promise<boolean>

        Password reset step 1: requests a reset link. The backend always answers generically (no user enumeration).

        Parameters

        • identifier: string

          Username or e-mail.

        Returns Promise<boolean>

        true once the request is accepted.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:85
    • resendVerification: function
      • resendVerification(identifier: string): Promise<boolean>

        Resends the verification mail (backend answers generically).

        Parameters

        • identifier: string

          Username or e-mail.

        Returns Promise<boolean>

        true once the request is accepted.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:146
    • resetPassword: function
      • resetPassword(token: string, newPassword: string): Promise<boolean>

        Password reset step 2: sets a new password using the one-time token from the e-mail link.

        Parameters

        • token: string

          The raw token from the reset link.

        • newPassword: string

          The new password.

        Returns Promise<boolean>

        true on success.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:105
    • setupTotp: function
      • setupTotp(): Promise<{ qrCodeDataUri: string; secret: string }>

        Starts 2FA setup.

        Returns Promise<{ qrCodeDataUri: string; secret: string }>

        The secret (for manual entry) and a qrCodeDataUri to scan.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:194
    • verifyEmail: function
      • verifyEmail(token: string): Promise<boolean>

        Confirms the account via the one-time token from the verification mail.

        Parameters

        • token: string

          The token from the verification link.

        Returns Promise<boolean>

        true on success.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:127
    • verifyTotpLogin: function
      • verifyTotpLogin(data: { code: string; mfaToken: string }): Promise<any>

        Login step 2: exchanges the short-lived MFA token and 6-digit code for a session.

        Parameters

        • data: { code: string; mfaToken: string }

          The MFA token from step 1 and the authenticator code.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The authenticated user payload.

        Throws

        Error if the code or token is invalid/expired.

        • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:58
    • Defined in services/api/authService.ts:14
